title: European High Streets See Recovery in Prime Retail Rents
summary: Prime retail rents on major European high streets are staging a notable recovery, with London's West End and Amsterdam's P.C. Hooftstraat leading the rebound. International luxury and lifestyle brands are driving demand, while vacancy rates on top-performing streets have fallen to pre-pandemic levels. The recovery is encouraging new cross-border investment in high-street retail assets across Western Europe.
